c1.name: Chapter 1 — 基本資訊
c1.description: Data inspection nodes that make tabular / image / text shapes legible. Includes EduColumnStats (per-column statistics with each step recorded).

c2.name: Chapter 2 — 經典 AI
c2.description: Hand-written classifiers: KNN, Linear Regression, Logistic Regression. Drop-in counterparts to the sklearn-backed production nodes.

c3.name: Chapter 3 — 圖像處理
c3.description: Stepped-out diffusion / U-Net teaching blocks: cross-attention, residual block with time embedding.

c4.name: Chapter 4 — 序列處理
c4.description: Transformer ingredients exposed step-by-step: token embedding, self-attention, multi-head attention, FFN.

c5.name: Chapter 5 — 強化學習
c5.description: Reinforcement learning teaching nodes. Includes EduPolicyGradient — one REINFORCE step exposed as softmax → gather → log → baseline → loss.

c6.name: Chapter 6 — 前沿技術
c6.description: Frontier topics. Includes EduPatchify — the unfold → permute → flatten chain that turns an image into a ViT token sequence.
